fault_hypothesis: The logic for capping the counter is incorrect. When the counter exceeds the cap, it is set to `cap - 1` instead of being set to `cap` on line 55.

spec.expr: cap is None or counters[key] != cap - 1

constraints.intent: The value of the counter should not be the result of the buggy `cap - 1` assignment.
If the counter is capped, its new value must be exactly the cap.
The returned counter value must never exceed the specified cap.
